positive: A mystical celestial forest scene. Highly stylized, intricate line art combined with vibrant watercolor washes. The main subject is a group of whimsical, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna (such as crystalline butterflies and glowing mushroom clusters) intertwined with massive, stylized roots and ancient, stylized trees. Composition must be centrally balanced and symmetrical, designed for a clean apparel repeat print. Strong contrast between deep navy background and neon pastel accents (lavender, teal, gold). Minimalist, graphic novel style with deep matte black elements. Concept art, digital painting, vaporwave aesthetic, detailed etching style, vector illustration, print-ready, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poorly drawn hands, ugly, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped, out of focus
